chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-201 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G *** Mr. Ghulam Mustafa advocate, while holding brief on behalf of Mr. Jaleel Ahmed Memon advocate, seeks adjournment on the ground that latter is busy before Bench of this Court at Sukkur. However, from perusal of the contents of memo of petition as well as prayer clause, it appears that petitioner through this petition is seeking direction against the respondent No.5/Assistant Commissioner to decide his pending appeal with regard to partition of the property between legal heirs of deceased Mst. Saddiqiqa and deceased Ali Muhammad Arain. Learned Additional A.G submits that vide Notification bearing No.DD(E&I)/HQ/BOR/2024/302 dated 21.10.2024 a Public Grievance Redressal Cell under the supervision of Deputy Commissioner of the District concerned has been notified for deciding/dealing with the issues like in hand in accordance with law, therefore, directions may be issued to Deputy Commissioner concerned for deciding the matter in accordance with law. When confronted with the above position, learned counsel holding brief seeking disposal of the petition accordingly submits that petitioner will file a fresh application before the Public Grievance Redressal Cell and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to file application before the Public Grievance Redressal Cell for redressal of his grievance, if any, within one week from today. In case petitioner files such application, the Deputy Commissioner Shaheed Benazirabad, being head of the Public Grievances Redressal Cell pursuant to aforesaid Notification, is then directed to decide the said application within a period of two months from today strictly in accordance with law after providing ample opportunity to all concerned.

In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to file application before the Public Grievance Redressal Cell for redressal of his grievance, if any, within one week from today. In case petitioner files such application, the Deputy Commissioner Shaheed Benazirabad, being head of the Public Grievances Redressal Cell pursuant to aforesaid Notification, is then directed to decide the said application within a period of two months from today strictly in accordance with law after providing ample opportunity to all concerned. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the office of learned Additional A.G Sindh and Deputy Commissioner Shaheed Benazirabad for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E
